name: com.towneh.videoarealight
description: Real-time area-light reflections from a video render texture for Unity URP 17 / Forward+. A bright video screen lights and reflects on glossy surfaces (floors, metal, panels) using an MRP specular approximation plus an analytic polygon irradiance integral. No precomputed lookup tables, no third-party data - MIT licensed.

samples.description: A small club-style venue showing the full feature set on a glossy floor: area-light reflections, zone-mask boundary, cascading probe volumes (Scalar + Quadrant), and static prop shadows. After import, run Tools > VideoAreaLight > Build Demo Scene to generate the scene and auto-bake its probe volumes.

Modular Shader template for Poiyomi Pro. Importing this isn't required - the installer at Tools > VideoAreaLight > Install Poiyomi Module pulls the template directly from the package. Imported only if you want to inspect or fork the source.
